title: Entity Offer Flower Behavior
description: Allows the mob to offer a flower to another mob with the minecraft:take_flower behavior.

chance_to_start.title: Chance To Start
chance_to_start.description: Percent chance that the mob will start this goal from 0.0 to 1.0 (where 1.0 = 100%).

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

Properties:
• domain (object)
• operator (object)
• subject (object)
• test (string)
• value (object)

Sample values:
• iron_golem: {"test":"is_daytime"}

max_head_rotation_y.title: Max Head Rotation Y
max_head_rotation_y.description: Maximum rotation (in degrees), on the Y-axis, this entity can rotate its head while trying to look at the target.

max_offer_flower_duration.title: Max Offer Flower Duration
max_offer_flower_duration.description: The max amount of time (in seconds) that the mob will offer the flower for before exiting the Goal.

max_rotation_x.title: Max Rotation X
max_rotation_x.description: Maximum rotation (in degrees), on the X-axis, this entity can rotate while trying to look at the target.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 5

defaultSnippets.label: Search Area (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Search Area as an object

search_area.title: Search Area
search_area.description: The dimensions of the AABB used to search for a potential mob to offer flower to.

defaultSnippets.label: Search Area (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Search Area as an object
